## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`cd chat-pwa && npx tsc --noEmit`).
- [ ] Python syntax is valid (`python -m py_compile *.py`).
- [ ] Public readiness audit passes (`python scripts/public_readiness.py`).
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant (README, docs/, in-app Docs.tsx).
- [ ] Security implications considered (no new auth bypasses, XSS, exposed secrets).
